private.title: 🏆 Quoto
private.body: I run quote-of-the-day windows in group chats. Add me to a group, then use /start there for controls.
private.language_note: Private chat follows your Telegram app language.

group.title: 🏆 Quoto control panel
group.admin_body: Use the buttons below to manage quotes, stats, and group language.
group.user_body: Use the buttons below to view quote stats.
group.schedule_line: Daily pick: {time}; skip if fewer than {min_messages} messages.

language.title: 🌐 Group language
language.hint: Choose the interface language for this group.

menu.group_context_required: Open this from a group chat.

admin.quote_only: 🔒 /quote with AI preview is available only to chat admins.
admin.admin_only: 🔒 This command is available only to chat admins.

chat_member.added: 👋 Hi, {chat_title}! I'm Quoto. At {time}, I pick and publish the quote of the day. Use /start to open stats, language, preview, and manual publishing controls.
chat_member.need_admin: ⚠️ Please make me an administrator with permission to pin messages so I can publish the result.

private.hello: 🏆 Hi! I'm Quoto I run quote-of-the-day windows and publish the result in your group. Use /start to open the control panel.

start.group: 🏆 Quoto — Quote of the Day I collect messages between two cutoff points and choose the winner at the end of the day. Use /start to open the control panel.

quote_preview.empty: 📭 There are no messages to preview for the current day yet.
quote_preview.title: 🔎 Current day preview
quote_preview.subthreshold: 🤫 If there are fewer than {min_messages} messages by {time}, the day will be skipped without publishing.
quote_preview.ai_verdict: 🤖 At {time}, AI will also decide whether the whole day is worth publishing.

manual_publish.checking: ⏳ Checking whether there is a day to publish manually...
manual_publish.nothing: 📭 There is no boring-day or failed day available for manual publishing.
manual_publish.already_sent: ⚠️ The latest day was already sent to Telegram, but the DB did not confirm the final status. I did not publish a duplicate.
manual_publish.failed: ❌ Manual publishing failed. Check the bot logs.

stats.missing: 📊 Stats are not available yet — the bot has not registered this group.
stats.empty: 📊 This chat has no published quotes yet.
stats.title: 📊 Chat stats

user_stats.empty: 📊 {user}, you do not have published quotes in this chat yet. Keep writing — your time will come! 💪
user_stats.title: 📊 Your stats

boring.title: 😴 Today was a boring day
boring.body: The bot did not find a strong enough quote to publish.
